rationale: The cheap LLM-only stress tests scheduled for t0019 (substantive sonnet judge + judge-model rotation) directly probe whether the +57 pp schema-only delta survives a stricter judge and whether the model-only -1 pp is masked by haiku-vs-haiku familial bias. Run those first ($5 LLM time vs $200-300 human time) and re-evaluate the human-kappa pass after results return. Demoted from high to medium.
